heading: Reserves on active duty: duties; funding
label: 12318 Reserves on active duty: duties; funding
notes: Amendments1994—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(e)(2)section 686 of this title, substituted “12302 or 12304” for “673 or 673b” in subsecs. (a) and (b) and “12310” for “678” in subsec. (b).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1675(c)(9)

Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 103–337section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this titleDec. 1, 1994
amendments: Amendments1994—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(e)(2)section 686 of this title, substituted “12302 or 12304” for “673 or 673b” in subsecs. (a) and (b) and “12310” for “678” in subsec. (b).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1675(c)(9)

Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 103–337section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this titleDec. 1, 1994

children.label: a
children.text: During a period that members of a reserve component are serving on active duty pursuant to an order under section 12302 or 12304 of this title, members of reserve components serving on active duty may perform duties in connection with either such section.

children.label: b
children.text: Funds available for the pay and allowances of Reserves referred to shall be available for the pay and allowances of such Reserves who perform duties in connection with section 12302 or 12304 of this title under the authority of subsection (a).section 12310 of this title
